name: Doughnuts (Fastnachts- a Shrove Tuesday Tradi
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk and let it cool to lukewarm.
2. Dissolve yeast in 1/2 cup of water and stir in 1/2 cup of flour until a batter forms.
3. Add this mixture to the cooled milk, stirring in 1 teaspoon of sugar and about 3 cups of flour.
4. Let the dough rise in a warm place overnight.
5. In the morning, add the well-beaten eggs, nutmeg, butter, remaining sugar, and salt; mix thoroughly until no more flour can be incorporated by hand.
6. Allow the dough to rise again until it is light.
7. Roll out on a floured surface and cut into doughnut shapes using a doughnut cutter.
8. Let the doughnuts rise once more before frying in hot fat until golden brown.
